title: The Homestretch
writer: Samuel Hoffenstein, Elizabeth Reinhardt, Wanda Tuchock
actors: Cornel Wilde, Maureen O'Hara, Glenn Langan
plot: A film that qualifies as a Travelogue Documentary in that it contains footage of world famous race tracks such as England's Ascot, Palermo in South America, and Churchill Downs, Jamaica, Aqueduct, Hollywood Park, Santa Anita, Belm...
